# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository, Connection, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, Index } from "typeorm";

@Entity({ name: "products" })
@Index(["name"])
@Index(["sku"])
@Index(["brand"])
@Index(["category"])
@Index(["price"])
@Index(["rating"])
@Index(["inStock"])
@Index(["isActive"])
@Index(["createdAt"])
class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn("uuid")
  id!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100, nullable: true })
  sku!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 120, nullable: true })
  brand!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 120, nullable: true })
  category!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 12, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  price!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  isActive!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" })
  createdAt!: Date;
}

type SortField = "createdAt" | "price" | "rating" | "name";
type SortDir = "asc" | "desc";

function toStringArray(v: unknown): string[] | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.flatMap((x) => (typeof x === "string" ? x.split(",") : [])).map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (typeof v === "string") return v.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  return undefined;
}

function toNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  const s = Array.isArray(v) ? String(v[0]) : String(v);
  const n = Number(s);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function toBoolean(v: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  const s = Array.isArray(v) ? String(v[0]) : String(v);
  if (s === "true" || s === "1") return true;
  if (s === "false" || s === "0") return false;
  return undefined;
}

function clamp(n: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, n));
}

function parseSortField(v: unknown): SortField {
  const s = (Array.isArray(v) ? String(v[0]) : String(v ?? "")).trim();
  if (s === "price" || s === "rating" || s === "name" || s === "createdAt") return s;
  return "createdAt";
}

function parseSortDir(v: unknown): SortDir {
  const s = (Array.isArray(v) ? String(v[0]) : String(v ?? "")).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (s === "asc" || s === "desc") return s;
  return "desc";
}

function escapeLike(s: string): string {
  return s.replace(/[\\%_]/g, "\\$&");
}

function tokenizeSearch(q: string): string[] {
  return q
    .trim()
    .split(/\s+/)
    .map((t) => t.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, 8);
}

function buildProductSearchSql(req: Request) {
  const q = typeof req.query.q === "string" ? req.query.q : undefined;
  const categories = toStringArray(req.query.category);
  const brands = toStringArray(req.query.brand);
  const skus = toStringArray(req.query.sku);
  const ids = toStringArray(req.query.id);

  const minPrice = toNumber(req.query.minPrice);
  const maxPrice = toNumber(req.query.maxPrice);
  const minRating = toNumber(req.query.minRating);
  const maxRating = toNumber(req.query.maxRating);

  const inStock = toBoolean(req.query.inStock);
  const isActive = toBoolean(req.query.isActive);

  const createdAfter = typeof req.query.createdAfter === "string" ? req.query.createdAfter : undefined;
  const createdBefore = typeof req.query.createdBefore === "string" ? req.query.createdBefore : undefined;

  const limit = clamp(toNumber(req.query.limit) ?? 24, 1, 100);
  const offset = clamp(toNumber(req.query.offset) ?? 0, 0, 1_000_000);

  const sortBy = parseSortField(req.query.sortBy);
  const sortDir = parseSortDir(req.query.sortDir);

  const whereParts: string[] = [];
  const params: any[] = [];

  // Base
  whereParts.push(`p."isActive" = $${params.length + 1}`);
  params.push(isActive ?? true);

  if (ids && ids.length) {
    whereParts.push(`p."id" = ANY($${params.length + 1}::uuid[])`);
    params.push(ids);
  }

  if (skus && skus.length) {
    whereParts.push(`p."sku" = ANY($${params.length + 1}::text[])`);
    params.push(skus);
  }

  if (brands && brands.length) {
    whereParts.push(`p."brand" = ANY($${params.length + 1}::text[])`);
    params.push(brands);
  }

  if (categories && categories.length) {
    whereParts.push(`p."category" = ANY($${params.length + 1}::text[])`);
    params.push(categories);
  }

  if (typeof minPrice === "number") {
    whereParts.push(`p."price"::numeric >= $${params.length + 1}::numeric`);
    params.push(minPrice);
  }

  if (typeof maxPrice === "number") {
    whereParts.push(`p."price"::numeric <= $${params.length + 1}::numeric`);
    params.push(maxPrice);
  }

  if (typeof minRating === "number") {
    whereParts.push(`p."rating"::numeric >= $${params.length + 1}::numeric`);
    params.push(minRating);
  }

  if (typeof maxRating === "number") {
    whereParts.push(`p."rating"::numeric <= $${params.length + 1}::numeric`);
    params.push(maxRating);
  }

  if (typeof inStock === "boolean") {
    if (inStock) whereParts.push(`p."stock" > 0`);
    else whereParts.push(`p."stock" <= 0`);
  }

  if (createdAfter) {
    whereParts.push(`p."createdAt" >= $${params.length + 1}::timestamptz`);
    params.push(createdAfter);
  }

  if (createdBefore) {
    whereParts.push(`p."createdAt" <= $${params.length + 1}::timestamptz`);
    params.push(createdBefore);
  }

  if (q && q.trim()) {
    const tokens = tokenizeSearch(q);
    for (const token of tokens) {
      const like = `%${escapeLike(token)}%`;
      whereParts.push(
        `(p."name" ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\' OR p."sku" ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\' OR p."brand" ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\')`
      );
      params.push(like);
    }
  }

  const whereSql = whereParts.length ? `WHERE ${whereParts.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  const orderBy =
    sortBy === "price"
      ? `p."price"::numeric ${sortDir.toUpperCase()}, p."createdAt" DESC`
      : sortBy === "rating"
      ? `p."rating"::numeric ${sortDir.toUpperCase()}, p."createdAt" DESC`
      : sortBy === "name"
      ? `p."name" ${sortDir.toUpperCase()}, p."createdAt" DESC`
      : `p."createdAt" ${sortDir.toUpperCase()}`;

  const dataSql = `
    SELECT
      p."id",
      p."name",
      p."sku",
      p."brand",
      p."category",
      p."price",
      p."rating",
      p."stock",
      p."isActive",
      p."createdAt"
    FROM "products" p
    ${whereSql}
    ORDER BY ${orderBy}
    LIMIT $${params.length + 1} OFFSET $${params.length + 2}
  `;

  const countSql = `
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "total"
    FROM "products" p
    ${whereSql}
  `;

  const dataParams = [...params, limit, offset];
  const countParams = [...params];

  return {
    filters: {
      q,
      ids,
      skus,
      brands,
      categories,
      minPrice,
      maxPrice,
      minRating,
      maxRating,
      inStock,
      isActive: isActive ?? true,
      createdAfter,
      createdBefore,
      limit,
      offset,
      sortBy,
      sortDir,
    },
    dataSql,
    dataParams,
    countSql,
    countParams,
  };
}

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

app.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
  try {
    const repo = getRepository(Product);
    const { filters, dataSql, dataParams, countSql, countParams } = buildProductSearchSql(req);

    const [items, countRows] = await Promise.all([repo.query(dataSql, dataParams), repo.query(countSql, countParams)]);
    const total = countRows?.[0]?.total ?? 0;

    res.json({
      items,
      total,
      limit: filters.limit,
      offset: filters.offset,
      sortBy: filters.sortBy,
      sortDir: filters.sortDir,
      filters,
    });
  } catch (err) {
    next(err);
  }
});

app.use((err: any, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
  const status = typeof err?.status === "number" ? err.status : 500;
  const message = err?.message ?? "Internal Server Error";
  res.status(status).json({ error: message });
});

async function bootstrap(): Promise<{ app: express.Express; connection: Connection }> {
  const connection = await createConnection({
    type: "postgres",
    host: process.env.DB_HOST ?? "localhost",
    port: Number(process.env.DB_PORT ?? 5432),
    username: process.env.DB_USER ?? "postgres",
    password: process.env.DB_PASS ?? "postgres",
    database: process.env.DB_NAME ?? "ecommerce",
    entities: [Product],
    synchronize: false,
    logging: false,
  });

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT ?? 3000);
  app.listen(port, () => {
    // server started
  });

  return { app, connection };
}

bootstrap().catch((e) => {
  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  console.error(e);
  process.exit(1);
});
